common.title: StreamsHub Console
common.noResultsFoundDescription: No results match the filter criteria. Clear all filters and try again.

kafka.noClusterDescription: No Kafka clusters are currently available.
kafka.name: Name

topics.title: Topics
topics.name: Name
topics.noTopicsDescription: There are no topics in this Kafka cluster yet.
topics.hideInternalTopicsTooltip: Internal topics are used by Kafka for internal operations and are typically hidden from users

partitions.title: Partitions
partitions.noPartitionsDescription: This topic does not have any partition information.
partitions.emptyStateBody: No partitions match the current filter criteria.
partitions.leaderTooltip: The broker that is currently the leader for this partition
partitions.preferredLeaderTooltip: Whether the current leader is the preferred leader
partitions.replicasTooltip: The brokers that have replicas of this partition

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.noConfigurationDescription: This topic does not have any configuration properties.
configuration.noResultsBody: No properties match the current filter criteria.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: View the data being produced to a topic. Browse messages, seek to a specific offset or timestamp by partition.
messages.noDataBody: Data will appear shortly after we receive produced messages.
messages.noResultsBody: Adjust your selection criteria and try again.

tooltip.size: The serialized size of the key and value. Calculated from the key/value/headers and does not include any overhead associated with the record in the physical log segment within Kafka.

advancedSearch.queryHelper: Enter your search terms to find matches within the selected field. Wildcards and regular expressions are not required or supported.

messages.manage_columns_description: Select and reorder columns to display in the messages table. Drag to reorder.

continuousMode.title: The screen displays only the most recent 100 messages, with older messages rotating out.

topics.managedTooltip: Managed topics are created using the KafkaTopic custom resource and are created and updated in the Kafka cluster by the Strimzi Topic Operator.

groups.title: Groups
groups.typeTooltip: The Kafka group type, such as Classic, Consumer, Streams, or Share.
groups.protocolTooltip: The protocol used by group members to coordinate partition assignments and rebalancing.
groups.stateTooltip:
Reflects the current operational state of the group.

Possible states include 'Stable,' 'Rebalancing,' or 'Empty.' 'Stable' indicates normal functioning, 'Rebalancing' means ongoing adjustments to the group's members, and 'Empty' suggests no active members.

If in the 'Empty' state, consider adding members to the group.
groups.overallLagTooltip:
The cumulative lag across all partitions assigned to the group.

Lag is the difference in the rate of production and consumption of messages.

Specifically, lag for a given member in a group indicates the delay between the last message in the partition and the message being currently picked up by the member.
groups.membersTooltip: Represents an individual member within the group. Monitor the lag of each member for insights into the health of the group.

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.rackTooltip: The rack ID for this node, used for rack-aware replica assignment
nodes.replicasTooltip: Total number of partition replicas (leaders + followers) on this broker
nodes.noNodesDescription: There are no nodes in this Kafka cluster.

running.label: Running
running.popoverText: The broker is registered and accepting client requests.

starting.label: Starting
starting.popoverText: The broker is catching up with the cluster metadata.

pendingControlledShutdown.label: Pending Controlled Shutdown
pendingControlledShutdown.popoverText: The broker is preparing for a controlled shutdown.

recovery.label: Recovery
recovery.popoverText: The broker has synced with the cluster metadata but is not fully active yet.

notRunning.label: Not Running
notRunning.popoverText: The broker is not active yet.

controllerStatus.quorumLeaderPopoverText: The leader of the metadata quorum (also known as the Active Controller). It handles all metadata requests from Kafka brokers.
controllerStatus.quorumFollowerPopoverText: Follower controllers replicate metadata written by the quorum leader (Active Controller) and serve as hot standbys in case of leader failure.
controllerStatus.quorumFollowerLaggedPopoverText: Follower controllers replicate metadata written by the quorum leader (Active Controller). This follower is lagging behind the leader. Quorum followers must stay up-to-date to prevent data loss if the leader fails.

distribution.title: Partition distribution
distribution.totalNodesTooltip: Total number of nodes in the cluster (brokers + controllers)
distribution.leadControllerTooltip: The node that is currently the active controller
distribution.partitionsDistributionOfTotalTooltip: Distribution of partition replicas across broker nodes
distribution.distributionChartDescription: Bar chart showing partition distribution across brokers
distribution.metricsUnavailable: Metrics are not available for this cluster

rebalancing.title: Rebalances
rebalancing.learnMoreAboutCruiseControl: Learn more about Cruise Control enablement
rebalancing.fullModeDescription: Moves replicas across all brokers. This is the default mode
rebalancing.addBrokersModeDescription: Moves replicas to newly added brokers. Brokers must be specified
rebalancing.removeBrokersModeDescription: Moves replicas off brokers to be removed. Brokers must be specified
rebalancing.noRebalancesDescription: Configure a KafkaRebalance resource to generate optimization proposals and initiate rebalances for your Kafka cluster.

proposalReady.label: Proposal Ready
proposalReady.tooltip: Optimization proposal is ready for approval

optimizationProposal.title: Optimization proposal for KafkaRebalance
optimizationProposal.description: A summary of proposed changes based on defined optimization goals, assessed in a specific order of priority.
optimizationProposal.dataToMoveTooltip: Total amount of data (in MB) moved across brokers as part of the optimization.
optimizationProposal.excludedBrokersForLeadershipTooltip: Brokers excluded from becoming leaders for any partition.
optimizationProposal.excludedBrokersForReplicaMoveTooltip: Brokers excluded from losing existing replicas or receiving new replicas
optimizationProposal.intraBrokerDataToMove: Intra Broker Data to Move MB
optimizationProposal.intraBrokerDataToMoveTooltip: Total amount of data (in MB) moved within individual brokers. For example, log directory changes.
optimizationProposal.monitoredPartitionsPercentageTooltip: Percentage of partitions being monitored for optimization. If this percentage is low, it may be necessary to investigate why certain partitions are not being monitored.
optimizationProposal.numIntraBrokerReplicaMovementsTooltip: Number of replica movements within the same broker.
optimizationProposal.numLeaderMovementsTooltip: Number of leadership changes for partitions.
optimizationProposal.numReplicaMovementsTooltip: Total number of replica movements across brokers.
optimizationProposal.onDemandBalancednessScoreAfterTooltip: Balancedness score of the Kafka cluster after optimization. If all goals are satisfied, the score is 100.
optimizationProposal.onDemandBalancednessScoreBeforeTooltip: Balancedness score of the Kafka cluster before optimization. Scores range from 0 to 100, where lower values indicate greater imbalance.
optimizationProposal.recentWindowsTooltip: Number of recent monitoring windows used to assess the Kafka cluster's performance for this optimization.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
